_meta.notes: Stage 1 round-8 minimal-clean. user 指示で master prompt guide を一旦忘れて基本要素から再構築。user 選択: Subject=B (type + 1-2 features) / Style=B (標準・designer brief なし) / Palette=C (token 列挙 + contrast principle 明示 = 会社 recipe を universal rule として埋め込み) / Constraints=★★★ のみ (No text / No Japanese / No decorative icons)。R7 minimal で発生した cream-on-cream washout は universal contrast principle 明示で解消狙い。Type 紛れ防止 list / 上層階人物禁止 / 排水管禁止 は意図的に削除（実バグ再発したら R9 で必要分のみ追加）。

vocabulary.prompt:
[WHAT]
Vocabulary card for Japanese language learning. The image must instantly read as a Japanese SCHOOL at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A Japanese public elementary school: a 3-story building with classroom windows, a school gate with metal fencing, and two children in school uniforms walking through the gate.
The English label "SCHOOL" is mounted above the main entrance — small, clearly legible. NO other text.

[STYLE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration for an educational brand style guide. Clean continuous black outlines, consistent line weight. Completely flat solid color fills only — no gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.

Limited palette: soft cream off-white background, deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue, warm amber gold. The building uses muted warm blue as its primary fill color to contrast with the cream background; cream and amber gold are used as accent details only.

[CONSTRAINTS]
- No text in the image other than the single label "SCHOOL".
- No Japanese kanji or kana.
- No decorative icons, logos, mascots, books, globes, stars, hearts on the building facade or signboard.

[WHAT]
Vocabulary card for Japanese language learning. The image must instantly read as a Japanese UNIVERSITY campus at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A Japanese university campus: a modern multi-story academic building behind a campus entrance gate (two pillars supporting a horizontal sign beam), with two young adult students in their 20s with backpacks walking through the gate.
The English label "UNIVERSITY" is mounted on the horizontal sign beam — small, clearly legible. NO other text.

[STYLE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration for an educational brand style guide. Clean continuous black outlines, consistent line weight. Completely flat solid color fills only — no gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.

Limited palette: soft cream off-white background, deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue, warm amber gold. The building uses muted warm blue as its primary fill color to contrast with the cream background; cream and amber gold are used as accent details only.

- No text in the image other than the single label "UNIVERSITY".
- No Japanese kanji or kana.
- No decorative icons, logos, mascots, books, globes, stars, hearts on the building facade or signboard.

[WHAT]
Vocabulary card for Japanese language learning. The image must instantly read as a Japanese DEPARTMENT STORE at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A Japanese mid-sized department store building (4-5 floors), substantial and wide, with large display windows on the ground floor showing mannequins in garments, and a shopper carrying a shopping bag near the entrance.
The English label "DEPT. STORE" is mounted on a horizontal signboard above the entrance — small, clearly legible. NO other text.

[STYLE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration for an educational brand style guide. Clean continuous black outlines, consistent line weight. Completely flat solid color fills only — no gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.

[WHAT]
Vocabulary card for Japanese language learning. The image must instantly read as a Japanese OFFICE BUILDING at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A modern Japanese mid-sized office building (4-6 floors) with a glass curtain wall facade, a ground-floor entrance with glass doors, and an office worker in a business suit carrying a briefcase walking in or out.
The English label "OFFICE" is mounted on a small signboard above the entrance — small, clearly legible. NO other text.
